summary: Iteration 33: Verified 2 new features - (1) Collapsible TopBar with summary stats and (2) Value Framework section in SmartFill tab. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'Collapsible is changing from uncontrolled to controlled' - minor React state management issue, non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: TopBar.jsx: Clean implementation with data-testids, collapsed state properly managed
ValueFramework.jsx: Well-structured with proper category rendering, discovery questions, and AI generation support
CustomerDetail.jsx: ValueFramework correctly integrated in SmartFill tab (lines 568-571)
ai.py: New /api/value-framework GET and /api/generate-value-props POST endpoints working correctly
valueFramework.py: Comprehensive data structure with 3 categories, each containing discovery questions, pain points, solutions, outcomes, and metrics
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features verified: (1) TopBar collapse toggle works - click chevron button at data-testid='topbar-collapse-toggle' to collapse/expand. When collapsed, summary stats show DCs, Sites, KW, IPs, and enabled Target Solutions. (2) Value Framework in SmartFill tab shows 3 Infoblox value categories (Optimize, Accelerate, Protect) with discovery questions, pain points (red), solutions (green), key metrics, and AI-powered value proposition generation. Key data-testids: topbar-collapse-toggle, topbar-collapsed-summary, value-framework, vf-category-optimize, vf-category-accelerate, vf-category-protect, generate-all-value-props, vf-question-{id}, vf-answer-{id}.

features: Collapsed summary shows: DCs count, Sites count, KW total, Active IPs, Target Solutions enabled/total with names
Expanded view shows full 4-column layout (Data Centers, Sites, Target Solutions, IP Calculator)
DC/Site entry forms work when expanded
Each category shows: Common Pain Points (red), How Infoblox Solves This (green), Key Metrics, Discovery Questions
Discovery questions expandable with input field for customer responses
AI Value Proposition section with Generate button per category
Generate All button generates for all 3 categories

GET /api/value-framework.response: Returns categories array with 3 objects (optimize, accelerate, protect)

POST /api/generate-value-props.note: Uses Gemini 3 Flash via Emergent LLM Key for AI generation
